query: What are Hyperliquid HIP-4 prediction markets? How does HIP-4 work? What markets are currently active, what is the volume, and how are they performing?
source: Web research (financefeeds.com, hyperpc.app, bitcoinfoundation.org) + Hyperliquid public API
note: HeyZibi API returned 401 (auth required). Data sourced from web research instead. HIP-4 outcome contracts are relatively new (launched Feb 2026).

hip4Overview.what_is_hip4: HIP-4 (Hyperliquid Improvement Proposal 4) introduces 'outcome trading' — fully-collateralized binary prediction market contracts on HyperCore L1. Users trade YES or NO outcome contracts on real-world events, governance milestones, and market outcomes.

mechanics.market_creation: Permissionless — anyone can create a market by staking 1,000,000 HYPE
mechanics.portfolio_margin: HIP-4 positions integrate with portfolio margin — tradeable alongside perps and spot in same account
mechanics.price_mechanics: Price reflects market-implied probability (0-1), settles to 1 (YES wins) or 0 (NO wins)

hip4Overview.vs_polymarket: Hyperliquid differs fundamentally from Polymarket — launching a market requires only 1M HYPE stake (no platform approval needed). Fully on-chain with sub-second finality and near-zero fees.

launchPerformance.firstEventContract: HIP-4 Event Contract (governance vote on HIP-4 sharding upgrade)
launchPerformance.marketShareAtLaunch: ~0.7% of total daily prediction market volume on day one
launchPerformance.significance: Orders of magnitude higher than prior governance-related trading instruments on competing platforms

activeMarketsSnapshot.note: Public API does not expose a direct HIP-4 market list endpoint. Data from web research as of May 2026.

knownActiveMarkets.name: HIP-4 Governance Implementation
knownActiveMarkets.description: Will Hyperliquid successfully implement HIP-4 sharding by Q2 2026?

ecosystemImpact: Expands Hyperliquid from pure perp DEX into comprehensive derivatives stack
Adds prediction market utility alongside perps, spot, and HIP-3 builder markets
HIP-4 positions can be held alongside leveraged perps in same portfolio (via portfolio margin)
Permissionless market creation differentiates from Polymarket's platform-approval model
Potential bridge between crypto-native event trading and traditional finance (DTCC tokenization, Oct 2026)

apiStatus.publicApiSupport: HIP-4 markets are not yet exposed via the standard /info API endpoints
apiStatus.recommendation: Monitor Hyperliquid docs and gitbook for new HIP-4 API endpoints as the product matures
